name: com.borderjung.unity-modules
description: Reusable Unity modules by BorderJung, bundled as a single package. Core (build-stripped Log, deterministic RNG), Events (SO event channels), SaveLoad (JSON), Localization (SO table + ILocalizationProvider), Settings (SO-driven settings + ISettingsRepository), and shared UI.

samples.description: Example SettingsSO, LocalizationTable, event-channel instances (wired to Border.Events), and Settings panel prefabs.
